hotel_name: Khách Sạn Hanoi Fantasea (Hanoi Fantasea Hotel)

reviews.title: No elevator
reviews.text: no elevator at all and my room is in 4th floor imagine getting my 2 luggage to my room and no one help me

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location.
reviews.negatives: The bed was full of mold and a million other stains. No insulation from the cold. The AC’s heater function did not work and it came on at random times during the night blasting cold air. The shower had extremely hot water that could seriously burn you. Mosquitoes in the room. Very dirty. Very noisy.

reviews.title: Worst customer service ever!!!
reviews.text:
Booked a day late because my bus from Sapa arrived too early in Hanoi. Before that, I tried to reach out to them to ask if early check-in was possible, but no one ever replied! They’re not on WhatsApp or Viber either.

I arrived at the hotel around 4 AM, and a very unaccommodating lady let me in. I asked if I could check in early, but she said they were fully booked. I then asked if I could wait in the lobby, and she agreed. Around 6 AM, someone checked out, so I asked again (using a translator) if I could check in early and even said I was willing to pay extra since I’d only be staying until 9 PM. She still refused and did so in a very irritable manner.

So I decided to leave and found another hotel nearby that kindly allowed me to check in early. Throughout the whole time, I never heard back from them. And now they have the nerve to ask how my stay was?!!

YOU GUYS SHOULD NOT BE IN THE SERVICE INDUSTRY!!!

reviews.title: Cheap place for for one or two nights max.
reviews.positives: The only good thing about the property is the location. I walked everywhere from there.
reviews.negatives: Well we have to agree it was  very cheap for a capital but even simple places should be properly cleaned. To be honest I felt the sweat from people that slept there before. I didn’t want to complain as I lived in dirty places as ny but it was really bad. So you don’t care, you walk all day long, take a shower and sleep like me you can book this place but you if you are picky you should choose a better one.

reviews.title: No lift, darty
reviews.text: Dirty, No lift

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Not helpful with transportation or booking. Low communication

reviews.title: Waste of money
reviews.text:
You won't be able to find this hotel..
No where in road, name of hotel written. 
Nearby vendor shopkeeper doesn't even know about this hotel. 
Your money will be at waste

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Location of the hotel is at middle of the City centre.
reviews.negatives: Room size was too small. There is one bed and only place to stand near to bed. Very congested room's.

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.text: Bad Services, Bad Quality, Dirty, No Daily Ask Cleaning, Staff Unfriendly/No Smile. No recommended this hotel, Price Higher than other hotel that give more good quality and services. I recommemded Stay in Hanoi View Legend Hanoi.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Good location in the center, near many restaurants and attractions. They allows late check-in and the staff are nice.
reviews.negatives: The facilities are old. The room and surroundings are very smelly.

reviews.title: Don't ever go to this hotel.
reviews.text: Hotel is dirty . Staff are rude to the customer. Don't want to provide room cleaning .  Hotel rooms are dirty. No ventilation. Bed sheets & towels not clean. Overall, very bad experience.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: It's got a fridge.
reviews.negatives: The toiletries are are expired.

reviews.title: Horrible experience
reviews.text:
I made my reservation 2
Months ahead, when I arrive in the hotel check in was easy, everything started after 30 minutes when they told me that the room they give me was already reserved for a group of 4 people and that I have to leave the room, I ask for 30 minutes so I can pack my stuff back, walking around Hanoi with my backpack with out a hotel wasn’t easy, for that reason I don’t recommend this hotel. 
Otherwise I have to admit it the hotel was clean, and the location is great, and sometimes things happend, just because this happens to me doesn’t mean will happen to you too.

reviews.title: Clean room and bathroom however some minor adjustments could be made for a more comfortable stay
reviews.positives: Room and bathroom were clean! Comfy bed too!
reviews.negatives: Luggage storage could be improved. The only option was to keep my bag in the main lobby (not even behind the reception desk). The room was quite small and noisy (however this is to be expected in the area in which it's located).

reviews.title: Poop left in toilet!
reviews.text:
The most disgusting experience i ever had! 
When i enter into the room toilet, poop left in the toilet without flush!
What the F@ck!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Excellent facilities and the location
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: It’s really not safe n clean area .....staffs not friendly at all or neither helpful . We had small kid and they didn’t even offer any help to carry our bags on the spiral stairway.Horrible experience

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Price and location
reviews.negatives: Rickety staircase. Heater did not work.

reviews.title: Don't go here!”
reviews.text:
We booked a room in advance and the hostel was overbooked, so they put us into another guesthouse-there it was really noisy. It is impossible to sleep longer then 7am! The other guesthouse didnt provide free drinking water and free banana.

And you should never book a tour at the  Hanoi Fantasea Hotel. At the beginning the stuff were really friendly-too friendly. Then he guy asked us, if we plan to go to Sapa, because he provides the cheapest tours. We told him that we already have a good offer for 3nights for 50$ with bus included. He told us he have the same tour for 91$ for two persons. So we booked his tour. Later we saw that he withdrawl 91$ per person and if we try to talk to him, he told us we get a better quality of tour, which we didnt ask for and we also slept in a homestay with 15 other people in a room. And out tour at the second day finished at 11am instead of 5 pm. And they also just took as in a earlier bus back to Hanoi, so we didnt had time to shower and we didnt get our dinner, which should also be included in the tour.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Muy buena ubicación en el old quarter. Personal agradable
reviews.negatives: habitacion pequeña , con mucho ruido del exterior . En el baño hay una chapa en la zona de la ventana y la limpieza en general no es la más adecuada.

reviews.title: service is not good
reviews.text: when I arrived hotel, the owner said that there is no room available for me(even thought I booked a month ago), then they took me to other hotel, which is allocated in small road and the room is a small room in terrace :| I dont recomment this place.

reviews.title: Aceptable
reviews.positives: Ubicación
reviews.negatives: Muy antigua la propiedad

reviews.title: Phòng rất tệ
reviews.text: Đây ko phải là khách sạn mà chỉ là 1 căn nhà cũ chủ làm phòng cho thuê và rất cũ kì, không có thang máy, chúng tôi phải tự khuân hành lý từ cửa lên tới lầu 4 bằng cầu thang nhỏ hẹp, vô phòng không có nước uống, không có xà bông tắm, tiếp tân thì thái độ không cần khách, khi chúng tôi xuống hỏi về nước uống trong phòng thì cô ấy nói phòng rẻ nên không có gì cả. Chúng tôi ở phòng chỉ vài tiếng thì trả phòng vì không thể chịu được phòng quá tệ và thái độ của nhân viên

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La ubicación muy buena y servicio bueno.
reviews.negatives: Muy simple y mucho ruido de los coches por la noche

reviews.title: Not what it claims to be
reviews.text: Rude rude rude staff. Very unhelpful . I had to go next door to get help regarding my taxi issue.  I chose not to go back as the reception desk and foyer didn't even match the picture  so I dreaded to think what the room would be like .  Avoid!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: La location dans le vieux quartier
reviews.negatives: Personnel pas trop accueillant. Hôtel très petit, pas très propre

reviews.title: Should change to hostel, not hotel
reviews.text: Nothing than just a bed to sleep overnight. Worst hostel than ever. Arrived at 2pm host saying room not finish cleaned up yet, waiting till 3pm still not finish... so must to go around and back at 6pm: toilet have no towel, no shampoo, brush (though i never use stuffs provided by hotel)... except for 2 combs putting in 2 mugs... ; trash till not yet emptied. Staying for 5nights: never cleaning up the room, except for changing towels once and empty trash once. Thinking of stay away..

reviews.title: Un peu vétuste mais pas cher pour un hôtel du centre.
reviews.positives: Ma localisation était très bien, dans le centre à 2 pas du lac Hoan Kiem, le prix est très abordable.
reviews.negatives: L’hôtel est un peu vétuste et pas particulièrement équipé.

reviews.title: NO ELEVATOR AND THE STAIRS ARE SMALL
reviews.text: No elevator at all and my room is at 4th floor I have 2 luggage and 1 bag and no one help me to get them lol.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: L’emplacement super 👌

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Stay there for 7 hours but during the duration can’t even feel the air conditioning. Reported it on the reception and they sent someone, however the issue doesn’t fix and the repairman can’t even communicate so we decided to stay outside as it is too hot inside that you’re sweating a lot.

reviews.title: Hotel bien placé et bon rapport qualité prix
reviews.positives:
Petit hôtel très bien situé dans le quartier central. Très bon rapport qualité prix. Accueil sympathique 
Bonne literie. Très propre
reviews.negatives: Il serait bienvenu d'avoir une ventilation dans la salle de bain car l'humidité ne sébacées pas et passe dans la chambre

reviews.title: Not recommended
reviews.text: 1 night before catching a flight, but for the price you can find better

reviews.title: Wir werden nie wiederkommen.
reviews.positives:
Die zentrale Lage war super, um alles in der Altstadt fußläufig zu erreichen.
Die Zimmerausstattung war wie angegeben.
reviews.negatives:
Die kompletten Wände in unserem Zimmer waren schimmelig. Auf Nachfrage wurde uns versprochen das Zimmer am nächsten Nachmittag zu wechseln. Als wir morgens gegen 10 Uhr gingen war es noch nicht möglich. Als wir nachmittags gegen 16 Uhr zurückkamen, wurde uns gesagt, dass bereits alle neuen Gäste eingecheckt hätten und wir kein anderes Zimmer bekommen können, weil wir unsere Sachen morgens nicht rausgestellt haben. Davon war vorher auch nie die Rede. Wir sind also eine weitere Nacht in diesem schimmeligen Zimmer geblieben und einen Tag eher abgereist. Geld haben wir keins zurückbekommen. Nach dem Aufenthalt waren all unsere Sachen feucht, da es im Badezimmer keine Lüftung gab und somit das Wasser vom Duschen nicht abziehen konnte.
Außerdem hat der Fernseher nicht funktioniert. Die Klimaanlage und den Ventilator haben wir uns nicht getraut anzuschalten, da beides sehr dreckig war und wir Angst hatten, was uns entgegenkommt.

reviews.title: Not a Fantasy As You Expected
reviews.text: Aircon was not functioning properly. Water shower is all over the place. Door knob was not secure. The key got broken because it does not fit well to the keyhole. Their 2nd duplicate got stuck as well and was unable to open the room.. Luckily the 3rd duplicate was able to open it. What’s even worse is they charge me 50,000 dong for the broken key.  After all the mishaps, I requested for a room change but the receptionist said there’s no available even if I saw several unoccupied rooms in the hotel. These made me decide to immediately leave the hotel even if I already paid for 2 nights.

reviews.title: recommended - central and inexpensive
reviews.positives:
I stayed at Fantasea Hotel for several nights in November 2023. I had a simple, clean, quiet and inexpensive room with a view of an inner courtyard. In addition to the bed, the room has two bedside tables, a wardrobe, a small refrigerator, a table, a chair, a TV and a hairdryer. The staff is friendly and helpful and speaks good English. You can book various tours directly at the hotel (Ha Long Bay, Ninh Bin, Sapa etc.). The hotel is located in the old town, next door there are cafes, restaurants and street food. Due to the weather I had to change my travel plans, a last-minute cancellation and change of my reservation for the Fantasea Hotel was possible without any problems and without any fees.
———————
Ich habe im November 2023 mehrere Nächte in diesem Hotel verbracht. Ich hatte ein einfaches, sauberes, ruhiges und preiswertes Zimmer mit Blick in einen Innenhof. Im Zimmer gibt es außer dem Bett, zwei Nachtschränke, einen Kleiderschrank, einen kleinen Kühlschrank, einen Tisch, einen Stuhl, TV und einen Föhn. Das Personal ist freundlich und hilfsbereit und spricht gut Englisch. Man kann verschiedene Touren direkt im Hotel buchen (Ha Long Bay, Ninh Bin, Sapa etc.). Das Hotel liegt in der Altstadt, nebenan sind Cafés, Restaurants und street food zu finden. Aufgrund des Wetters musste ich meine Reisepläne ändern, eine kurzfristige Stornierung und Änderung meiner Reservierung für die Übernachtungen im Fantasea Hotel war ohne Probleme und ohne Gebühren möglich.
reviews.negatives:
The water pressure in the bathroom shower was very low. 
The duvet had no duvet cover.

reviews.title: BLOOD STAINED BED SHEET AND BLANKET
reviews.text:
To my horror blood stain everywhere on the bed sheet and comforter.
They asked us to park our motorcycles 500m away

reviews.title: Sehr angenehm
reviews.positives: Das Personal, die gemütlichen Betten und die gute Lage
reviews.negatives: Das alles etwas enger ist

reviews.title: Don’t trust the pictures and description
reviews.text:
When you book, you feel like you had the best deal on Earth: large rooms, shiny equipment, tiny cosy breakfast room. Looks very nice.

When you arrive, in real, it is very far from this: ridiculously small rooms, humid, basic and cheap equipment. Everything is more or less broken or not repaired. Banister is loose, and you have to carry your luggages up to your room.
Two surprises:
1) There is no breakfast, on the contrary to what is written on the Agoda website and booking.
2) If you ask for a airport pick-up, they send you a grab car for 17$. The next day, you just cross the street and get the same for 10$...

Bad deal, really

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Location is okay. But the lady staff is not helpful.

It's a small house and I don't see any. Lady is not rude. But they don't speak English and can't even say you a yes or a no. Not happy at all with this lady and the services.

reviews.title: Don’t let your eyes deceive you!
reviews.text: All the pics you see are taken 10 years ago! It’s not even a hostel!

reviews.title: Tệ
reviews.positives: Nhân viên khá hoà đồng
reviews.negatives: Không có thang máy, điều hoà hỏng không có khí ga mát.

reviews.title: Budget traveller option
reviews.text:
Booked a room for a short stint in Hanoi. 

While we are appreciative of the location within the old quarters, The state of the room can be better improved. 

The sheets were not cleaned adequately and the air conditioning wasn't working, factor in the heat and noise of Hanoi. 

Recommended for Budget Travellers only.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Tak disyorkan untuk Wargaemas sebab tiada lif. Penyambut tetamu tak mesrapelangan.

reviews.title: Tổng quan là hài lòng. Thực ra cũng ko ở lại nhà nghỉ nhiều chủ yếu là đi tham quan nên cá nhân ko quan trọng về dịch vụ
reviews.positives: Gần phố cổ nên đi lại tiện, vị trí cũng dễ tìm, hài lòng nhất là mình tới nhà nghỉ vào lúc rạng sáng cũng may có nhân viên trực nên được vào chứ ko ở ngoài chắc rét mất
reviews.negatives: Nhà đã cũ, điều hoà ko có chế độ sưởi ấm nên đi vào mùa đông khá lạnh, chăn khá mỏng. Nhìn chung sạch sẽ khang trang

reviews.title: If you have more than 1 backpack, let me tell you they don't have an elevator!
reviews.text: It's a very basic place but that's what you get for the price you are paying. Good for budget travel if you don't have more than a backpack because the steps are narrow and big so it gets difficult to carry it to your room. No early check in as I arrived at 7 am and was ready to pay extra. You will be asked to come back after 12pm .They will gladly keep your luggage safe so that you can roam around. But after all the travel you are really exhausted to see around yet you do it because you don't have a choice so plan your arrivals accordingly.  Wouldn't recommend because there is no elevator.  Otherwise location is the only good thing.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Vị trí thuận tiện, gần nhiều quán ăn ngon. Cô chủ có chỉ chỗ cho thuê xe máy giá khá rẻ.
reviews.negatives: Khách sạn không có thang máy và cầu thang hơi nhỏ nên khách mang hành lý nhiều hơi khó khăn tí.

reviews.title: Loud, smelly, bad wifi, water issues
reviews.text: The first room we were put in had no working wifi in it, or hot water. After trying to explain this to the man at reception who spoke next to no English (had to use google translate to communicate) he played with the taps and got some hot water to drip out and then tried to connect my phone to the wifi on the floor below, which would only work outside the room, and very poorly too. He could see my frustration and so kindly moved us to a new room with better connection and hot water. However this move was soon soured by the fact that this was on level 1 right next to the road where there was extremely loud road resurfacing happening at 1/2am in the morning, making it impossible to sleep. The noxious smell of tar was also apparent and gave us both headaches. Although this is not entirely the hotels fault, it still made for an extremely unpleasant stay. Would not recommend, there are other similarly priced hotels that I'm sure would provide a better experience.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Very cheap hotel but manage your expectations.
reviews.text:
We only stay here for a night and the first time i opened the door is I saw a cockroach, sadly.  If you are staying here for short time and looking for budget friendly that would be okay. But please note that the room is not big and it’s bit hard to pack your things because of the space. But if you are okay with that, then this hotel would be okay. Solo traveller would be fine. 

No lift, so you need to manage to carry your luggage up to your room.

reviews.negatives: No lift, Very slow water pressure at shower. And worst was the one who was sitting at the reception who was a bit rude when asked about the lift and help on moving luggage to fourth floor.

reviews.title: Not worth

Literally can't move once you're in the room, its really small for two people. There's no window, no ventilator. The bathroom shower didn't work. Had to use the sink to store up water and shower with a cup 😅
Pay a little more and find a better room.

reviews.title: i regret that i stay at this hotel. i should stay somewhere else for a little bit extra money.
reviews.positives: The location is good. Near to anything like cafe, convenience store and restaurant.
reviews.negatives: I was given a room at the highest floor. the stairs are steep and very narrow. The lady wearing spectacle who give me the room says that because i booked using Booking.com. The room is at the 4th floor. There were same rooms (twin double) at the 2nd floor and how do i know this because available room the door will be open and there were open till next day when i check out, but she refused to give it to me because according to her if booking thru booking.com the room would be on the 4th floor. The room were too small and not worth the price.

reviews.title: Waste of money

AC should be replaced as it old✅

reviews.title: Lousy service
reviews.text: My wife reach the hotel at 5am on 11th March (noticfy hotel will be late check in), the staffs suppose on duty was not at the counter instead of his friend, refuse to let her check in even she show him the booking confirmation coupon printed her name , my wife call me in the early morning while i still at Singapore. Call to Agoda service hotline and complain, thanks to Agoda staff helping. When i reach the hotel at the same day in the evening time, found the room was very small, the room suppose to be Deluxe twin, and my wife told me they down grade her initial big room in to the much smaller room, one of the staff ; a middle age woman told her because we book the room at the low rate. Too tired to argue with them, anyway we are only to stay for 1 night and heading to next destination.

reviews.title: Good

It's a bit old property but they are well maintained.. the bed is huge and comfortable..good working aircon.

reviews.title: location is great
reviews.text: rooms are old and not too clean

reviews.title: Good.. quiet budget room, nice staff, good location. QUIET......:)
reviews.positives: Location very good, old quarter Hanoi. On suite room was basic, however this was reflected in the low price. Room cleanliness was good. Room had a window onto an internal yard. Due to the fact this room was on the inside of the building we had no noise whatsoever. Brilliant. Loud street noise in Hanoi is 24/7. Lady on reception spoke good English and also booked us a well organised trip to Halong Bay. We recommend this hotel.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: Not worth it, unclean
reviews.text:
The (different) staff upon check in and check out were sat on their phones uninterested, just handed us the key and took the key from us, with no conversation or offer to show us to our room. We were initially given the wrong room and had to ask to change.
The bedding was clean and comfortable. However the walls of the room were filthy, with remnants of snot visible on the wall.
The bathroom was very clean but the hot water did not last long and the shower head holder only allowed it to spray perpendicular to the wall.
The windows allowed a lot of noise from the street in. Location is good though.
I would not recommend this place; there are many nicer options for a similar price nearby.

reviews.title: Great hotel and location for the price. friendly helpful
reviews.positives: Great location, friendly staff, late check i, very short walk to old quarter. Bed was very comfy, lent us a kettle on request so we could make tea. Room needs paining and a new shower head would be good. This is a good hotel for the price and location. Would recommend. Steve and Ginette.
reviews.negatives: Paintwork was dirty.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: You get what u paid for. The onky goid thing about this place is the lication. I will not recommend this hotel to my worse enemy.

reviews.title: Exceptional

Location is good, however my room was on the street side so I heard everything outside which was annoying. Room was relatively clean but it was very cramped.

Overall I'd say it's worth the money if you plan to not spend much time there and just want an accessible location to keep your things and rest.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: AGODA giving false information about there is lift provided in the hotel. However, when we stay there for couple of days, there is no lift in the hotel. ...  Alot mosquitoes and small bugs inside the room. . During our stay for few days, sometimes there were electricity cut off during the night. Should have regular check by maintenance ppls. .Anyway, the price is cheap with a lot small coffee stalls surrounds it...

reviews.title: You get what you pay for
reviews.text: I have been traveling around SE Asia for several years and have pretty high tolerance for cheap hotels, but I wouldn’t recommend this one.  The room had many stains on the walls, pillow, and with a large line of ants marching across the walls behind (and some on) my bed.  The bathroom was dirty and not mopped or even rinsed from the past guest, half-used toilet paper, etc.  No free water or coffee, but they do provide you with 3 coffee cups in your room for some reason.

reviews.title: Staff not really friendly

Good location to go around
Hotel is very small, no lift
Staff was rude at the begining but later was vẻry kind.
Facilities were too old, damaged
Bed is ok
Around has other new hotel with the same price

reviews.title: Normal

Toilet dirty & water can't flow in toilet basin. Bed too soft. 
Need some renovation.
Location & staff is good.

reviews.title: Good budget hotel in city centre.
reviews.text: Good budget hotel, staff very friendly and helpful. Rooms were basic but just what you need, wifi was good.
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, good central location, wifi worked.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Staff are friendly. There are dents on the wall.

reviews.title: Stressful check-in
reviews.text: At 7: 40 am I wanted to check in early with 200k addition charge. The counter lady (thin long hair young lady) purposely delay until 8.00am to pass to the other colleague without any explanation. She just ignore our request. Bad start for my trip to Hanoi. The check-in just took lest than 1 minute when the new colleague took over. Wondering why she need to wait and never bother to explain the reason. Just ignore us. Bad attitude

reviews.title: budget hotel
reviews.text: small room but central located, suitable for 1 night stay

reviews.title: Recommend for one night cheap stay
reviews.text:
Room is small (as indicated), air con not cold and furnishing worn and tired. Fridge in room works, hot shower works and WIFI signal is good. We stayed one night to catch early morning bus and would not recommend staying longer.
Sapa bus office is about 15 minutes walk.
Staff is friendly and accommodating to our requests.

reviews.title: It was an okey stay
reviews.text: We were unlucky during our stay, the water company cut off the supply for one day and they didn't store enough water for everyone in the hostel. It's quite inconvenient for people who travel with big luggage, there is no lift and the staircase is very narrow.

reviews.title: Simple

reviews.title: Ok for budget travel
reviews.text: It is value for money

reviews.title: Small room okay only for stopover
reviews.text: i stayed here quickly as a stopover and wouldn't recommend it for more than that. the room was very cramped and dark. window opened to a small ventilation area. had to walk several flights to get up to the room. location was okay but not ideal. returned to hanoi and found much better options later.
reviews.positives: Location was not bad

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Location was very good, but no lift and i need to go 3rd floor on stairs. They didn't kept water, no fridge, no electric cattle.

reviews.title: Good for Short Stays, Basic but Practical
reviews.text:
We booked this hotel only for a few hours since we arrived very early from Sa Pa and couldn’t check in to our main hotel until 2 PM. For that purpose, it served us well.
The accommodations are very basic, but the bed was comfortable enough and the air conditioning worked really well. We were able to get some proper rest and slept soundly during our short stay.
The price is affordable for a private room for two with its own bathroom. They also provided basic toiletries and towels, which was convenient. Another plus is the 24/7 reception, which made early arrival hassle-free.
However, cleanliness could definitely be improved. The room didn’t feel very well-maintained, and that might be an issue for longer stays. Also, space is quite limited—there’s no room to properly open large luggage, which was inconvenient for us since we were traveling for a week.
Overall, it’s a decent option if you just need a quick place to rest for a few hours, but not ideal for a longer or more comfortable stay.

reviews.title: Value for money just lay over
reviews.text: Rooms are tiny . walls and staircase not maintained properly .  No elevator in the hotel . Elders plz avoid

reviews.title: Descent Stay for a Night NO WIFI
reviews.text: They let us drop off our bags early and the room was descent. It was located within walking distance to everything in the old quarter. Fan + air con good. The biggest issue was THE WIFI SUCKED. We were planning on booking buses and accommodation for the rest of our travel but couldn’t here. Phones worked better without the WiFi.

reviews.title: Above average

reviews.title: It's okay
reviews.text:
You get what you pay for. I checked in at 2:00 PM, checked out at 8:30 PM of the same day.

No elevators but it was okay since I was just on the second floor. This is just a 1-star hostel and is incredibly cheap, so do not expect too much. Recommended for short stays.

reviews.title: It's alright for one night.
reviews.text: Very very noisy place. They start cleaning and washing after 22.00. You can hear them everywhere up until 3.00 AM. Staff very strange. You can ask each of them whether or not you can extend your stay and based on who is in the reception (asking 5 minutes one after other) you get totally different answers. Yes you can means no you cannot. Mouldy walls.

reviews.title: Cheap compared to other hotel nearby.
reviews.text:
The hotel's good things are
1. Location

Things that I don't like are
1. Hotel has no elevator. My room is on 3th floor. Stair to get there is very very narrow. Not convenient for guest who have heavy luggage.
2. Room cleanness is not quite good.
3.wifi is broken

reviews.title: good  budget room and value for money paid.

reviews.title: Stayed 1 night for flight transit
reviews.text:
The photo in the website and real is very different. I stayed only one night for flight transit. 

Hotel condition is quite old a bit dirty in the floor. 

Location is a walk about 5-10 mins to Hoan Kiem Lake. Entrance is a small building. Location from Noi Bai airport by taxi is about 45 mins.

Staff is helpful and friendly. I also booked taxi to Noi Bai airport in the early morning of next day and the taxi was ready before time.

reviews.title: not the best hotel, ok for the price
reviews.text: The hotel was in a good location, within walking distance to the Old Quarter and the lake. The staff were very friendly. However I was disappointed with the standard of the room. It was very small and a bit shabby, the wallpaper was peeling off most of the walls. The bathroom was very small. The shower was plummed to the tap in the sink so when I turned on the tap to wash my hands i got drenched by the shower which was placed over the sink and toilet and pretty awkward to stand under. We only stayed one night in between tours to Ha Long Bay and Sapa so it was ok for a cheap bed for the night, nothing more.

The accommodation has no parking, locks the doors at night, and is not suitable for tourists. The only advantage is its location in the old city center, which is convenient for getting around.

Also staff are loud downstairs in the mornings which echoes upstairs, I'm guessing it's to do with their tours as its a booking office. Would stay again as beds are very comfortable and had a very nice hot shower!

I think that the only thing good about this hotel are their tours, which is highly rated for their halaong bay tours and various miscellaneous small tours.

reviews.title: I Have Mixed Feelings

My room was a bit problematic, where the electricity had some issues. In the middle of the night, something exploded, and I could smell something burning, and the electricity in my room is completely shut off. But the staff was nice enough to change my room in the middle of the night. The room was not the cleanest, but just basic. If my first room didn’t have the electricity issue, I’d recommend it due to the proximity to a lot of tourist attractions.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Property is situated in a good location, near to almost everything. Will recommend for short stay. not recommended for elderly as the property doesn't have an elevator. Staffs were okay, not good not bad, haven't really interacted with them.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text:
The lady at the reception was helpful, I booked a Hà Long bay trip with them and it was nice.
The room is small but I didn't need much, the same bathroom but there was strong smell of mould and visible on the walls. It's loud as it's on the main street but I wanted that location so I knew it could be noisy. Because of the mould I don't recommend it.

reviews.title: Great Location and Friendly Staff, with a Few Comfort Trade-offs
reviews.text:
We had a generally pleasant stay at this hotel. The receptionists were very kind, accommodating, and able to communicate well in English. They were also helpful in allowing us to leave our luggage, which we really appreciated.
The location is a big plus—it’s very convenient, close to the Old Quarter, with plenty of food stalls and even some Michelin-rated restaurants nearby.
However, there are a few things that could be improved. There is no elevator, and the stairs are quite steep, which can be challenging if you have heavy luggage. Some rooms also lack basic amenities like a hairdryer and an exhaust fan in the bathroom, so it can feel quite hot and humid after showering.
We also noticed a few small bugs in the room, though thankfully they didn’t bite. At night, it can get a bit noisy until around 11 PM due to a nearby bar, but it quiets down afterward. On the positive side, the internet connection was reliable.
Overall, it’s a good place to stay, especially for travelers who are not too particular and prioritize location and friendly service.

reviews.title: Not for the weak knees!
reviews.text:
The place is super small. There's no elevator 😭🥹
There is no bell boy too.
And they gave a room that located at the 4th floor! Imagine, having a 20kilos baggage + 7 kilos hand carry, you need to lift all your things going up and down by yourself! 🥹
The stairs is really stiff and narrow. Not kids friendly. Maybe for people who has no baggage is fine.  On the positive side, the location is very good since it is very near to the attraction places in old quarter. The staff can't hardly understand English so you need to Google translate, but they are very nice and helpful.  The hotel is also budget friendly. The room has hot and cold shower too. So a plus points.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: It's nice but not that spacious

reviews.title: Good stay for few days
reviews.text: Early check in they allowed us.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Location near shops in the city, close to Starbucks, lively at night, easy to walk around. The bed is sagging, causing back pain, and there are no towels provided for change.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Near bus stop & just beside starbucks with lots of store. The only problem is it has no elevator & very difficult if u have big luggage. The place is also a bit worn out.

reviews.title: No
reviews.text: No

reviews.title: Great location and value for money
reviews.text: Rooms maybe small but it's clean and has all the facilities you require. If you plan to go out most of the time and only need a comfortable bed to sleep in, this hotel is a great option. For the price you pay, it's a bargain.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Fair Price but if you are looking for good and clean place, dont stay here. It is suitable for budget traveler who will use for sleep only. The room is very very small. Water tap is not working well. the stair place is too small and not good for person who cannot walk well and elder person.

reviews.title: No
reviews.text: No

reviews.title: Affordable stay but not so clean
reviews.text:
This hotel is located at the heart of Old Quarter. It’s walking distance from everything. Its landmark is a Starbucks with a tiger mossaic wall so it’s not hard to miss. Price is very affordable so I can’t complain much about our quick stay here. There was hot water and AC plus a wall fan in our room. 

I wouldn’t suggest this accommodation for people with big luggages since the stairs is quite steep and narrow with a very shaky handrail. All of the staff are female too so although they are friendly, they can’t help much with your bags. 

The comforter was stained so we didn’t use. Cleanliness can be an issue so that is something to consider as well.

Overall, I wouldn’t say that our stay was bad. We were out almost the entire time and just used the bathroom and slept for a few hours. For the price, it’s not a bad deal but it’s just not for everyone.

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: the staff is helpful to assist booking of taxi to go to the airport at 4am, the con is the stairs is small and no lift

Building does not has lifts, so not convenient if staying higher levels as staircase is very narrow.

reviews.title: Good Hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is very accessible especially if you have a tour package where they can pick you and and send back to the hotel.

reviews.title: Good quality for Good price
reviews.text: with relatively low price ~16$ , the hostle provide basic needs and the room is also quite clean. my pillow smells really nice. the room was small but still tidy. Nice stay with good price with good quality.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
We stayed in a quiet double room with a window overlooking local houses. As indicated, though room size is average it is sufficient for us. Air con worked fine, WIFI signal good and fridge in room.
Steep stairs though again, this is no problem for us as we carry backpacks.
Railway station is about 20 minutes walk, 5 minutes to Hoan Kiem lake.
The female staff who checked us in was friendly and speaks good English. We did not get a chance to speak to other staff but they smiled and were friendly when we walked past reception.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Good location near to famous food stall & cafe

reviews.title: Just one nite
reviews.text:
Think what you pay, 
and expect for it. 
One nite was enough, wont stay more than that.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: The room was too pack for 4persons to walk inside and put lugggages. However, everythings was good.

reviews.title: Good stay yet can be improved
reviews.text:
Upon our arrival, we were told that they had overlooked on our room booking for 2 double bed rooms for 3 nights and therefore only left 1 room. The only solution was to squeeze all 4 of us into 1 family room with 2 double deckers. Left with no choice, we agreed for the first night but not the rest of the nights. Eventually they were able to arrange 2 double single bed rooms for our second day of stay. Although we felt disappointed at first, the solution given was still acceptable. 

Location is good but the noises of vehicles, especially the horn in the middle of the night may be unbearable and could disturb our sleep. 

The room and the washroom were quite clean. But still able to notice the dust underneath the bed. 

Overall, we are quite satisfied with their services.

reviews.title: Short and Simple
reviews.text: Enjoyable stay

reviews.title: Short and Simple
reviews.text: Great location and services

reviews.title: Well located shoe box
reviews.text: Beds like concrete and the bizarre shower over toilet bathroom. But the location was great, staff friendly and helpful. Reasonable for the cost.

reviews.title: Super comfy bed
reviews.text: The door has panels that make the room a bit too bright to sleep. Bring a mask.

reviews.title: So-So stay
reviews.text: The location is great. The staff were helpful and spoke English well. The rooms were... okay. Our first room had a serious mold problem. We asked to switch (we have allergies) and they gave us a much cleaner room without any hassle. The rooms were cramped, but comfortable.
reviews.positives: location and staff

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Tour package is reasonable…
reviews.positives: Clean Room, Good location

reviews.title: Short and Simple
reviews.text: Great. This is my return stay to HFH. Never disappointed. Rooms are still beautifully done up, and tours are still so cheap. Friendly day and night staffs standing by to assist my every needs. Coffee around are still as good as ever. Love it.
reviews.positives: Location, Room, Tours

reviews.title: Service was adequate, friendly fellow travellers
reviews.text: I pretty much enjoyed it. I got a good rate  and they were will willing to extend that rate when I decided to my stay there. I did not have any problems myself, but I did observe several billing disputes between management and other guests at the hotel during my two to three-week stay there. At one point they asked me if they could put into a room at another hotel overnight when they were overbooked. I held firm. Breakfast was included but you needed to get there by 9:00-30AM before the kitchen closed.
reviews.positives: room problems addressed right away, adequate internet in room and good location

reviews.title: Friendly staff
reviews.text:
very helpful staff really want to make your stay enjoyable. the rooms are not the newest, but for the price you get a clean room with aircon and bathroom.
the location is slightly away from the street vendor area.
reviews.positives: Price, location and staff

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Noisy

reviews.title: Nice place to stay in Hanoi old quarter area.
reviews.text:
We stayed here 3 years ago last time and it is still a very nice hotel in the Hanoi, old quarter area.

Double room was good size for 2 backpackers with AC + fan.
Also tv and refrigerator in the room.

Bathroom was clean with hot water.

Location is great. Many restaurants, shops, bars etc. in walking distance.
There's a local bar next door with good bia hoi.

Depends what room you'll get about the noise from the street. Room 302 was good because the window is not to the street.

reviews.title: Great Location and Friendly Staff, with a Few Comfort Trade-offs
reviews.text:
We had a generally pleasant stay at this hotel. The receptionists were very kind, accommodating, and able to communicate well in English. They were also helpful in allowing us to leave our luggage, which we really appreciated.
The location is a big plus, it’s very convenient, close to the Old Quarter, with plenty of food stalls and even some Michelin-rated restaurants nearby.
However, there are a few things that could be improved. There is no elevator, and the stairs are quite steep, which can be challenging if you have heavy luggage. Some rooms also lack basic amenities like a hairdryer and an exhaust fan in the bathroom, so it can feel quite hot and humid after showering.
We also noticed a few small bugs in the room, though thankfully they didn’t bite. At night, it can get a bit noisy until around 11 PM due to a nearby bar, but it quiets down afterward. On the positive side, the internet connection was reliable.
Overall, it’s a good place to stay, especially for travelers who are not too particular and prioritize location and friendly service.

reviews.title: General a good option
reviews.text: Location is excellent, walking distance to everything. Staff were the best! Nice English speakers, very friendly and helpful! Room was ok just, simple and very old.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Good for its price. No elevator

reviews.title: stairs are tiny & no elevator
reviews.text: Location is at the heart of old quarter. i will not recommend to someone that has luggage. Stairs are too tiny and one matured lady that can speak a little English is very rude.

reviews.title: Exactly as described on webs
reviews.text: Good basic hotel in a good location. Room is quiet small but for a couple of nights you can't go wrong.

reviews.title: Budget hotel and accessible to all tourist areas in the Old Quarter
reviews.text: The room is not spacious enough to open two big luggages but the bed space is enough to occupy the whole room. It is not being maintained daily by the staff but can be accommodated upon request. There is no trash can in the room, the only one available is in the toilet and is not being picked up by the staff daily. The reception desk is 24h and knows how to speak english. Would still recommend this hotel of you're on a budget.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: When we arrived around 6 am nobody available in the reception all lights was off,as it was written the reception  it is 24 hour open. So we just roamed around the place until we saw it was already lights on and that’s  the time we go inside the hotel and we pay for another 3,000 Vietnamese Dong for the early checked in.

reviews.title: Cheaper option for hotel
reviews.text: Recommended for those who are less sensitive when it comes to facility. There's no elevator. Expect a tiring moment on your way upstairs especially if you have large luggages. No attendant to help you carry things. The location is superb. Few walks aways from food stores.

reviews.title: No
reviews.text: No

reviews.title: Our Hanoi Trip
reviews.text: Location wise, the hotel was so near and at the center of everything (old quarters, french quarters, the lake, and all of the recommended coffee shops and shopping area).  What i didn't like is that the TV was not working, no hair dryer, the room was too small that we had to hop over our luggages to get around the room. The bathroom was clean, but the glass shelf by the sink was a bit rusty and already moving much that the glass cups could easily fall and break.
